system.description:
This partial Mage class subtly manipulates the thoughts of others and controls its users mind and body. Thought Noble Benefits. A Thought Noble is taken by an Adventurer alongside another partial class. A Partial Warrior/Thought Noble might be a cunning duelist with uncanny foreknowledge, while a Partial High Mage/Thought Noble might be an arcanist who unearthed psychic secrets. All Thought Nobles gain Notice at level-0, or level-1 if already trained. A disciplined sensorium is essential to interpreting foreign mental inputs. Thought Nobles do not cast spells; they develop cognitive and telepathic abilities according to their studies.
